description_short: Memphis sits on the Mississippi River at the southern edge of the Mid-South tornado region with risk year-round, including damaging winter ice storms.
description_long: Located in southwestern Tennessee on the Mississippi River, Memphis faces severe tornado and thunderstorm risk during the spring and fall storm seasons, plus a secondary winter tornado peak — a hallmark of "Dixie Alley." Ice storms cause major disruption when they occur. Shelby County is served by NWS Memphis (office code MEG) within forecast zone TNZ088 (Shelby).
